[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

No readable text is visible in the screenshot.

# Structured Version

- [No extractable text]

# Notes

- The image appears to show a person outdoors near a building and plants.
- Any potential small logos/patch text on the clothing or background signage are not legible at this resolution, so they are marked as not extractable.

Pertanyaan asli user: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young Indonesian male student stands confidently in his school uniform, which consists of a white short-sleeved shirt with a gray tie and gray trousers. The shirt has several patches and emblems, including a small Indonesian flag on the left sleeve and school crests on the chest and tie. He has a gray school cap hanging from his belt loop. His hair is neatly styled with a fade haircut.

He is standing outdoors in what appears to be a school courtyard. The background features a building with a yellow facade, red window frames, and a red-tiled roof overhang. Lush green foliage, including palm fronds and other tropical plants, surrounds the building and the student. The ground is paved with hexagonal gray stones, and a black backpack rests on the ground to the right of the student.

The lighting suggests it is daytime, with natural light illuminating the scene. The overall color palette is a mix of the student's uniform colors (white, gray), the vibrant green of the plants, and the yellow and red of the building. The mood is one of youthful pride and readiness, possibly on the way to or from school. The style is realistic, capturing the everyday scene of a student in a tropical school environment.
